'''machudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroblast|fibroblast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroblast|fibroblast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| machudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || mæchidith || mæchidij || mæchidish || mæchidi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || machuchuduth || machuchuduj || machuchudush || machuchudu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || machuduth || machuduj || machudush || machudu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || machufdufth || machufdufj || machufdufsh || machufduf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || machuduthu || machuduju || machudushu || machuduku
|-
| [[Patient]] || machuduth || machuduj || machudush || machudu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || machuduthul || machudujul || machudushul || machudukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || machuduuthuthu || machuduujuju || machuduushushu || machuduuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || machuduthun || machudujun || machudushun || machudukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || machuduthuoro || machudujuoro || machudushuoro || machudukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
